reviews.review_msg: Super reasonable and down to earth prof. The most organized prof I've ever had - clear lectures, clear expectations for assignments/tests and exams. Very open to feedback.

KEVIN!!!!!! was amazing. He cares so much about his students and their success. However, u need to attend class and spend time in the rock lab room practising for the labs. Read the lecture slides. They will be helpful in class and on tests. but overall, I would take his class again. 
ps he loves rock jokes!!!

KEVINNNNNN, this dude cares so much about his students and you can tell. I would legit re-take this course just so i could have him as my prof again. SO wholesome and overall just such a good person. He makes learning the course fun and engaging, and any help you need he will go above and beyond for you. Legit love this dude. 10/10 class

I've never had a professer care so much about students. He even did some office hours on the weekend. I think he is a genuinely good person and he taught us good. I wish he taught other stuff, but I don't think he is a regular teacher. Would take with him again.
I LOVE KEVIN! He is very helpful and makes clear the things learn. Notes are good.
Loved his course. This guy knows his stuff. Tough marker, but fair.

Used the slides that a former prof for the course used. Consequently he often read off the slides, and even commented  that he does read the slides prior to lecture. Very unprepared, unclear, unengaged, and confusing.. The course content itself isn't uninteresting, but I highly recommended taking it with a different prof.

Awesome. Simply awesome. He is super helpful and eager about what he teaches. His lectures are great- he's straightforward and to the point and always has a funny story. If you pay attention, you'll get a good grade.

Such inconsistency. He used lecture slides from the course's old professor and would regularly state how he disagreed with the info contained in them. He also stated that he disagreed with the textbook and the lab manual on many occasions, so it was confusing in terms of what content to remember and what questions he would ask. Do not take with him
